title: decaspermum bracteatum
intro: Decaspermum bracteatum, also known as the bush cherry or bushy cherry, is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrtaceae. It is native to Australia and has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Decaspermum bracteatum include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Decaspermum bracteatum can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to support overall health and well-being.
